case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. RAUL ZAPATA CABRAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-20-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PER, PLAINTIFF DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P.NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
